message:
fix(insert): resolve subqueries in INSERT VALUES before VDBE codegen (#97)

INSERT INTO t VALUES (1, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM other)) was returning NULL
because VDBE codegen passes None as scan context to emit_expr for VALUES
rows, causing Expr::Subquery to emit NULL.

Fix: add resolve_insert_values_subqueries() preprocessing step in
compile_table_insert() — eagerly evaluates subqueries via
inline_subqueries_in_expr() and replaces them with literal values
before codegen. Handles both InsertSource::Values and
InsertSource::Select(SelectCore::Values).

Un-ignored test_conformance_subquery_in_insert_values_s365.

736 pass, 0 fail, 10 ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
